scripts.build: bun run build.types && bun run build.client && bun run build.server
scripts.lint: bun run lint.oxlint && bun run lint.dead-code
scripts.lint.oxlint: oxlint src adapters plugins scripts lighthouserc.cjs lighthouserc.desktop.cjs vite.config.ts
scripts.lighthouse: bun run build && lhci autorun --config=lighthouserc.cjs && lhci autorun --config=lighthouserc.desktop.cjs && bun scripts/assert-lighthouse-reports.ts
scripts.preinstall: bun -e "import { execSync } from 'node:child_process'; import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'; if (existsSync('.git')) { execSync('git config core.hooksPath hooks', { stdio: 'inherit' }); }"
scripts.preview: PREVIEW_BUILD=true qwik build preview && vite preview --open
scripts.setup: bun -e "import { execSync } from 'node:child_process'; execSync('git config core.hooksPath hooks', { stdio: 'inherit' })"
